app_description: Create and share floor plans for your apartment
home_empty_description: Upload a floorplan, add your furniture, and see what fits.
home_sign_in_banner: Sign in to sync and share your projects across devices
home_delete_description: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
home_invalid_import_description: The selected file is not a valid project export.
branch_create_description: Enter a name for the new branch.
item_list_empty_hint: Add sofas, tables, beds — anything you need to place.
canvas_upload_description: Drag and drop an image of your floorplan, or click to browse
canvas_upload_hint: A photo, scan, or screenshot of your floorplan works great.
canvas_calibrate_description: Tap two points to draw a reference line, then enter its real-world length.
canvas_calibrate_desktop_hint: Scroll to zoom, drag to pan.
canvas_calibrate_mobile_hint: Pinch to zoom, drag to pan.
comments_placement_message: Click on the floorplan to place a comment
project_change_floorplan_description: Change floorplan? Item positions will be kept.
project_mcp_description: Control which tools AI assistants can use in this project.
sharing_dialog_description: Invite people to collaborate. Owners can manage roles and remove members.
sharing_links_description: Create read-only links for anonymous viewers.
sharing_link_no_password_warning: Anyone with this link can view your floorplan.
settings_general_profile_description: Your profile information is managed by your OAuth provider
settings_mcp_description: Configure Model Context Protocol access for Claude Code and other AI assistants
settings_mcp_oauth_description: Use these credentials to connect Claude Code or other MCP clients to your account
settings_mcp_secret_warning: Save this secret now. For security reasons, it will not be shown again.
settings_mcp_secret_hidden: Your client secret is hidden for security. If you need to view it again, regenerate a new secret below.
settings_mcp_regenerate_description: Generate a new client secret and invalidate all existing access tokens. This will disconnect all currently connected MCP clients.
settings_mcp_redirect_description: Register the callback URLs that your MCP clients use. The OAuth authorization flow will only redirect to these URIs.
settings_mcp_no_uris_warning: No redirect URIs registered. You must add at least one redirect URI before using OAuth. For Claude.ai, add your callback URL (e.g., https://claude.ai/oauth/callback).
settings_mcp_setup_description: How to connect Claude Code to your Floorplanner account
settings_mcp_step1_instruction_1: Go to claude.ai and open Settings
settings_mcp_step1_instruction_3: Add a new MCP server with the credentials above
settings_mcp_step1_instruction_4: Use the server URL, client ID, and client secret shown below
settings_mcp_step2_description: When you first use the MCP connection, you'll be prompted to authorize access in your browser. This allows the MCP client to access your Floorplanner data securely.
settings_mcp_capability_2: Create new projects and floor plans
settings_mcp_capability_4: Batch add/update multiple items at once
settings_mcp_capability_6: Get room contents and available space
settings_mcp_capability_8: Guided workflows (furnish room, optimize layout, shopping list)
settings_mcp_capability_9: Project and floorplan data as MCP resources
oauth_consent_description: Grant access to your Floorplanner data
oauth_consent_permissions_intro: is requesting access to your account with the following permissions:
oauth_consent_permission_1: View your projects and floor plans
oauth_consent_warning: By approving, you allow this application to access your Floorplanner data on your behalf. You can revoke access at any time from your account settings.
oauth_error_unknown_description: An unexpected error occurred during the OAuth authorization flow.
invite_error_not_found_message: This invite link is invalid or no longer exists.
invite_error_expired_message: This invite has expired. Ask the project owner to send a new link.
invite_error_used_message: This invite has already been accepted.
invite_error_email_message: Sign in with the same email address that received this invite.
invite_error_email_mismatch_message: Sign in with the same email address that received this invite.
invite_error_generic_message: Something went wrong while processing this invite.
invite_error_load_message: Please check your connection and try again.
share_error_invalid_title: This link is invalid or has expired
share_error_invalid_message: Ask the owner for a new share link.
share_error_too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
share_no_floorplan: No floorplan uploaded for this project.
auth_import_description: You have {count} {count, plural, one {project} other {projects}} saved locally. Select which ones to import to your account.
history_empty_filtered: No changes match the current filters.
error_sync_project: Could not sync project to cloud
share_invite_send_error: Failed to send invite. Please try again.
item_image_upload_error: One or more images failed to upload
landing_hero_subhead: Upload a floorplan. Drag furniture. See what fits — together.
landing_features_title: Built for real rooms, not render farms.
landing_feature_collab_desc: See others' cursors. Edit together. No merge conflicts.
landing_feature_branches_desc: Compare layouts side by side. Iterate without losing work.
landing_feature_ai_desc: Let AI agents read your floorplan and place furniture for you.
landing_feature_share_desc: Public links, password protection, viewer and editor roles.
landing_how_title: Three steps to a furnished room.
landing_how_step1_desc: Drop in an image or a PDF export. Scale and rotate until it's square on the grid.
landing_how_step2_desc: Drop two points on a known dimension — a wall length, a door width — and the rest is real metres.
landing_how_step3_desc: Add items with real dimensions, snap to the grid, share the result with a link.
landing_more_pwa_desc: Install on your phone. Plan without Wi-Fi — your drafts live in your browser.
landing_more_comments_desc: Pin feedback right onto the canvas or onto specific furniture.
landing_more_export_desc: Everything is JSON. Download a project, hand it off, import it back.
landing_more_i18n_desc: Swiss-friendly. The whole interface switches locales on the fly.
landing_more_history_desc: Every add, move, and delete is tracked per branch. Roll back mistakes.
landing_cta_subtitle: Free. Open source. Hosted in Switzerland.
landing_footer_tagline: A drafting table for the apartment-hunt era.
privacy_intro: Wohnungs-Plan is a personal hobby project by a solo developer. This policy explains what data the app collects, how it is used, and how you can control it.
privacy_data_intro: When you use Wohnungs-Plan, the app stores the following information:
privacy_data_account: Account information: your name, email address, and profile picture URL, provided by your Infomaniak account when you sign in.
privacy_data_projects: Projects: the floorplan images you upload, furniture items you place (dimensions, colours, prices, product URLs, photos), branches and variants, and comments you make.
privacy_data_uploads: Uploaded files: floorplan images and furniture photos are stored on the server filesystem and linked to your project.
privacy_data_sharing: Sharing metadata: the share links you create, their optional password hashes, and the list of members you invite to a project.
privacy_data_oauth: OAuth and MCP grants: the third-party clients you authorise so they can read or edit your projects on your behalf. You can revoke these at any time in settings.
privacy_data_session: Session cookie: a random identifier that keeps you signed in. No tracking, no third-party cookies.
privacy_not_collected: The app does not collect your location, device identifiers, usage analytics, advertising identifiers, or any data beyond what is listed above. There are no ads, no tracking SDKs, and no crash-reporting services.
privacy_use: Your data is used solely to provide the planning functionality of the app — showing your projects, syncing them between devices, and powering collaboration with people you invite. Your data is never sold, never used for advertising, and never shared with third parties for any purpose.
privacy_storage: All data is stored on a self-hosted PostgreSQL database located in Switzerland. Uploaded files live on the server filesystem on the same machine. The server is maintained by the developer. Data is transmitted over encrypted HTTPS connections.
privacy_tp_intro: Wohnungs-Plan uses a single external service:
privacy_tp_infomaniak: Infomaniak (authentication): when you sign in, you authenticate through Infomaniak's OpenID Connect service. Infomaniak provides your name, email, and profile picture URL to the app. Infomaniak is a Swiss company subject to Swiss data protection law. Their privacy policy is available at infomaniak.com.
privacy_tp_none: There are no analytics, no ads, no crash reporting, and no other tracking SDKs.
privacy_collab: When you invite members to a project or publish a share link, the data in that project becomes visible to those recipients. Public share links can be password-protected at your option. While project members are editing together, cursor positions and live edits are broadcast over WebSockets between connected clients; cursor positions themselves are not persisted to the database.
privacy_oauth: If you grant a third-party client (for example, an AI agent) access to your account through OAuth, the tokens you issue allow that client to read and modify your projects on your behalf. You can review and revoke these grants at any time under Settings → MCP.
privacy_offline: Projects you create without signing in live only in your browser's IndexedDB storage. They are never sent to the server unless you explicitly choose to sync them to your account.
privacy_retention: Your data is kept for as long as you have an account. You can request deletion of your account and all associated data at any time by opening an issue on GitHub — your data will be permanently removed from the database.
privacy_children: Wohnungs-Plan is not directed at children under the age of 13 and does not knowingly collect data from children.
privacy_changes: If this policy changes, the updated version will be posted here with a new effective date. Since this is a small hobby project, changes will be rare.
privacy_contact: For questions about this policy or to exercise your rights under Swiss data protection law, open an issue on the GitHub repository.
